/usr/bin/c++  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/xyz_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/neighbor_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/math_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/descriptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nep_inference.dir/src/model.cpp.o -o nep_inference  -Wl,-rpath,/home/luowh/nep_spin/MagneticNEP_CPP/dependencies/libtorch/lib ../dependencies/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so ../dependencies/libtorch/lib/libc10.so ../dependencies/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/luowh/nep_spin/MagneticNEP_CPP/dependencies/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed ../dependencies/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/luowh/nep_spin/MagneticNEP_CPP/dependencies/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
